experiences.description:
Modernization of legacy systems through migration to Spring Boot, reducing technical debt and improving maintainability. I implemented JWT-based authentication with Spring Security and enhanced observability through improvements in logging and traceability, facilitating incident detection and reducing diagnostic times.
 Evolved modules from a modular monolith to microservices, improving system scalability and enabling independent deployments, greater resilience, and decoupling between domains.
 Participated in frontend tasks creating pixel-perfect user interfaces

Participated in the migration of a legacy application to Spring Boot reducing technical debt and improving maintainability. Enhanced observability through improvements in logging and traceability, facilitating incident detection and reducing diagnostic times.

Development of the frontend for a cross-platform Android application (smartphone and tablet), optimizing user experience through adaptive interfaces and ensuring performance and stability across different devices.

projects.title: Outfit Creator - Backend
projects.description: Backend for a digital wardrobe app. Allows you to add your clothing items to generate different outfits taking into account different parameters.

projects.title: Outfit Creator - Frontend
projects.description: Frontend for a digital wardrobe app. Allows you to add your clothing items to generate different outfits taking into account different parameters.

projects.title: Portfolio
projects.description: This presentation website is also accessible on my Github. It was created using AI during the learning process.

projects.title: Hexagonal Architecture Example
projects.description: Example of hexagonal architecture with Spring Boot. Implements a REST API for managing orders, with a domain layer independent of the infrastructure. Development using AI to accelerate the learning process, always using this tool as support and reviewing the code.
